text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I shouldn't have read so much manga
before going to bed...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But they were finally about to get together... I
couldn't just go to sleep before that happened...
Urgh.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... I'll just read one chapter tonight. Maybe two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Mejiro Dober didn't get a very good
night's rest.
